A synthetic concept document used to demonstrate a valid OKF v0.1 concept.

# Schema

| Field        | Type   | Description                         |
|--------------|--------|-------------------------------------|
| `entity_id`  | string | Unique identifier for the entity.   |
| `name`       | string | Human-readable entity name.         |
| `created_at` | date   | When the entity was first recorded. |

# References

See also the [Onboarding Playbook](/playbooks/onboarding.md) for operational context.
